prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a Geometric Brownian Motion (GBM) model, a common stochastic process used for modeling asset prices. Historical daily adjusted close prices for TMO over the past two years (from May 2022 to May 2024) were used to estimate the model's parameters: daily drift (mean log return) and daily volatility (standard deviation of log returns). These parameters were estimated as approximately 0.000371 for daily drift and 0.012353 for daily volatility. A Monte Carlo simulation of 10,000 paths was then performed, projecting the price for 20 days forward. The point estimate is the median of these simulated end prices, and the confidence intervals are derived from the corresponding percentiles of the simulated price distribution (e.g., 50% CI from the 25th and 75th percentiles).
